narrative:
Precinct Mill Township (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 1,342 registered voters, with 58.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.9%, a clear Democratic lean of 6.4 percentage points.
